title: GATE-11 scoped low-risk emergency corridor approval

base_git_sha.description: Ancestor commit the diff is measured against — typically origin/main's tip at approval time.

source_git_sha.description: The exact commit being deployed. Must equal HEAD at check time.

owner_read_diff_confirmation.description: Must be literally true. Never set by an agent; only by the owner after personally reading the diff.

test_evidence_sha256.description: SHA-256 of the literal, verbatim test-runner output (backend + frontend) the owner reviewed — not a self-reported pass/fail.
